title: Holosoma Video Export Validation
body: Validated checkpoint video export on magrathea-1 without interrupting the active MJWarp training run.
Used CPU-safe evaluation path (`simulator:mujoco`, `CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=""`) from checkpoint `model_0004000.pt`.
Generated four local MP4 files under `logs/video_smoke_20260304_223552/episode_*.mp4`.

campaign.notes: Video export smoke for MJWarp training artefacts.
